digitalLiteracy: Advanced knowledge of software development, computing systems, and emerging technologies, and I regularly use and evaluate new tools and platforms.
securityPractices: I am aware of cybersecurity risks and I follow security and privacy best practices. I use strong authentication practices (strong passwords, 2FA, etc.).
trustPropensity: I generally trust digital systems when they come from reputable and well-established providers, but I remain cautious about privacy, data usage and security. I usually review permissions, privacy settings and reliability before adopting new digital services.
professionalSkills: Software development and programming, artificial intelligence and machine learning, design and build software solutions, familiarity with modern frameworks and computing technologies
softSkills: Ability to explain complex concepts clearly, problem-solving, analytical thinking,  collaboration and teamwork
